name: Security State Bank Of Wanamingo
description_short: Community bank in Wanamingo, MN offering checking, savings, CDs, and loan products with over 100 years of established local service.
description_long: Security State Bank of Wanamingo is a locally-rooted community bank headquartered in Wanamingo, Minnesota, with a history spanning over 100 years of service to the region. The bank operates from a single physical location at 232 Main Street in Wanamingo and maintains traditional banking hours with phone and online support available to customers. The bank offers a range of standard banking products including deposit accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with terms ranging from 3 months to 60 months, online and mobile banking platforms, debit cards, and loan products. Notably, they advertise AgBMP loans at 3% interest, suggesting agricultural or business lending focus. They provide basic banking services such as check reordering, account access through online banking portals, and lost/stolen card reporting. What distinguishes Security State Bank is its emphasis on community engagement, evidenced by programs like their annual Community Photo Contest and a Community Spotlight news feature highlighting local businesses. The bank prioritizes security and fraud awareness, featuring educational content on scam recognition on their homepage. They maintain FDIC-standard compliance and transparency practices, including clear privacy policies and USA Patriot Act disclosures. As a single-location community bank, Security State Bank of Wanamingo is best suited for customers seeking personalized local banking relationships rather than extensive branch networks or cutting-edge digital-first services. Their CD rates as of November 2025 are competitive within the mid-tier range (6-month CD at 3.50% APY), though customers should compare against larger regional or national institutions. The bank's focus remains traditional community banking rather than specialized lending or innovative fintech solutions.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with terms from 3 months to 60 months
Online banking platform with customer login
Debit cards with lost/stolen card reporting
Community photo contest and engagement programs
pros: Over 100 years of established history and community trust in the Wanamingo region
Competitive CD rates including 6-month CD at 3.50% APY and 12-month CD at 3.25% APY as of November 2025
AgBMP agricultural loans available at 3% interest rate
Multiple contact options including phone (507-824-2265), toll-free (800-879-6854), fax, and online contact forms
Online and mobile banking platforms available for account access and management
Active community engagement through photo contests and Community Spotlight news program
Clear security messaging with emphasis on fraud awareness and scam recognition education
cons: Single physical branch location limits accessibility for customers outside the Wanamingo area
Limited branch hours (Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday-Friday 8am-3pm only) may not accommodate all customer schedules
Website contact form explicitly warns it is not secure for sensitive information, requiring phone calls for account matters instead
No mention of advanced digital banking features, investment services, or wealth management products typical of larger institutions
Minimum CD balance requirement of $500 may not suit all savings profiles
best_for: Residents and businesses in Wanamingo, Minnesota seeking personalized local banking relationships
Agricultural customers interested in AgBMP loans at favorable 3% rates
Community-minded depositors who prioritize local institution support over national bank networks
CD investors looking for competitive rates in the 3-6 month to 60-month term range
diagnosis: Security State Bank of Wanamingo is best for customers in or near Wanamingo, Minnesota who value personal relationships with their banker and community reinvestment over convenience and digital innovation. The main caveat is that as a single-branch, limited-hours community bank, it is not practical for customers requiring extensive branch access, 24/7 service, or sophisticated financial products.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
